TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Rodrigo Duterte ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 3, Rodrigo Duterte, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1945) mrhuw Philippines ta' misuw hya' ga Rodrigo Duterte, aring ryax tay 30 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: ro*ri…£o *uterte rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, ro*ri…£o *uterte, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw pńßilippines~…ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a ro*ri…£o *uterte, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
S.FORM: Rodrigo Duterte ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 3, Rodrigo Duterte, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1945) mrhuw Philippines ta' misuw hya' ga Rodrigo Duterte, aring ryax tay 30 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
